zh.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie是Baron Eudes De Rye和Rohese FitzRichard de Clare的女兒，於1076年1月24日出生在英國英格蘭艾可可爾斯特。她於大約1095年與William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1119年11月13日在英國英格蘭艾可利可林享年43歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie是Baron Eudes De Rye和Rohese FitzRichard de Clare的女儿，于1076年1月24日出生在英国英格兰艾可可爾斯特。她于大约1095年与William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1119年11月13日在英国英格兰艾可利可林享年43岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Pye  , in part a cognate of 2 below.
French: nickname from Old French pie ‘magpie’, perhaps given to a talkative person or someone who had a loud, chattering voice.
French (Pié): variant of Piet ‘foot’. Compare Pease and Pee .

variants.name: Pye
meanings: English (north-West Midlands, Lancashire, Yorkshire, and Norfolk): nickname from Middle English (Old French) pie ‘magpie’, which could be given to someone who wore black and white clothing, had grey-streaked dark hair, or had a loud, chattering voice and impertinent behaviour, or was cunning or sly. The uncomplimentary senses derive from the bird's behavior and are recorded uses of the word in Middle English and early Modern English.

English: occasionally perhaps a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn named Pie ‘magpie’. There were two London taverns so named, but whether these gave rise to a hereditary surname is not known. Surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French and Middle English pie ‘merciful, compassionate, kind’, a variant of Old French, Anglo-Norman French piu, peu; see Pew (2).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie was born on 24 January 1076, in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Baron Eudes De Rye and Rohese FitzRichard de Clare. She married William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London about 1095, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 13 November 1119, in Rickling, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie est née le 24 janvier 1076, à Colchester, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Baron Eudes De Rye et Rohese FitzRichard de Clare. Elle a épousé William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London environ 1095, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 novembre 1119, à Rickling, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie wurde am 24. Januar 1076 in Colchester, Essex, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Baron Eudes De Rye und Rohese FitzRichard de Clare geboren. Sie hat um 1095 in England William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. November 1119 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Rickling, Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie è nata il il 24 gennaio 1076 nel Colchester, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Baron Eudes De Rye e Rohese FitzRichard de Clare. Lei sposato William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London circa 1095, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 novembre 1119, nel Rickling, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Rieは1076年1月24日にイギリスイギリスエセックスコルチェスターでBaron Eudes De RyeとRohese FitzRichard de Clareの娘として生まれた。約1095年にイギリスでWilliam de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in Londonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1119年11月13日にイギリスイギリスエセックスリックリングで43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie(은)는 1076년 1월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 코체스터에서 Baron Eudes De Rye(와)과 Rohese FitzRichard de Clare의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1095년 영국에서 William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1119년 11월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 릭링에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.24 Jan 1076–13 November 1119: 24 de janeiro de 1076–13 de novembro de 1119
pt.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie nasceu em 24 de janeiro de 1076, em Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Baron Eudes De Rye e Rohese FitzRichard de Clare. Ela casou-se com William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London aproximadamente 1095, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1119, em Rickling, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 43 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie родилась 24 января 1076 г. в местности колчестир, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Baron Eudes De Rye и Rohese FitzRichard de Clare. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London около 1095 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 ноября 1119 г. в местности рикклинг, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет.

es.24 Jan 1076–13 November 1119: 24 de enero de 1076–13 de noviembre de 1119
es.lifeSummary: Margaret Rie nació el 24 de enero de 1076, en Colchester, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Baron Eudes De Rye y Rohese FitzRichard de Clare. Se casó con William de Mandeville Constable at the Tower in London aproximadamente 1095, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1119, en Rickling, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años.
